rounds.provocation: We need to be more AGILE and DISRUPTIVE, or we're finished!
comebacks: We could hold a meeting about it.
Sir, you've disrupted your own coffee onto your shirt.
I'll circle back on that.

rounds.provocation: My nephew built an app in a WEEKEND. Why is this taking you a week?
comebacks: Because your nephew's app is one button that plays an airhorn.
We'll simply sprint harder.
Weeks contain weekends, sir. It's a known flaw.

rounds.provocation: I wanted this YESTERDAY! Time is money!
comebacks: Understood. Delivering tomorrow.
Time is a flat circle, actually.
Then I'll invoice you for yesterday too.

winConsequence.flavorText: The client looks down. Silence. Then: 'You're right. Let's just do good work.' Victory.

loseConsequence.flavorText: He books seventeen alignment workshops. You attend all of them. In spirit, you are elsewhere.

rounds.provocation: Let's leverage our synergies to maximize stakeholder value!
comebacks: Absolutely, let's touch base offline.
Which stakeholder? Gino? Gino just wants his mug.
I have a deck about that.

rounds.provocation: We must ideate outside the box, then circle back INTO the box!
comebacks: The box is a cubicle, and Gino lives there. Knock first.
Great, I'll book the box for 3 PM.
Which box are we talking about, fiscally?

rounds.provocation: Our North Star metric demands paradigm-shifting deliverables!
comebacks: Noted. Shifting paradigms as we speak.
Your North Star is the vending machine light, and it's out of crisps.
I'll add it to the backlog behind the other paradigms.

winConsequence.flavorText: He opens his mouth. Closes it. 'Who... who is Gino?' The spell is broken. The room applauds.

loseConsequence.flavorText: Your deck had 4 slides. His had 400. You drown in synergy.

rounds.provocation: This quarter we'll simply do MORE with LESS!
comebacks: More what? Less what? I need specifics.
We tried that. The printer is still crying.
Great vision, chief.

rounds.provocation: I've cut the coffee budget. Consider it a wellness initiative!
comebacks: Thank you for thinking of our health.
I'll simply hydrate with ambition.
Decaf is a crime scene, not a wellness initiative.

rounds.provocation: If everyone worked 10% harder, we wouldn't need raises!
comebacks: Then work 10% harder at math.
Truly inspiring, sir.
Raises? What are those?

winConsequence.flavorText: Everyone turns to the printer. It sobs once, softly. The budget is restored out of pure guilt.

loseConsequence.flavorText: 'Great vision, chief' was, in retrospect, a surrender. The snack budget is gone.

rounds.provocation: From today, we are an AI-FIRST company! Humans... second. Or third.
comebacks: Who will laugh at your golf stories, sir?
Understood. Deploying.
Can the AI attend your birthday party?

rounds.provocation: The AI wrote a mission statement in 0.3 seconds! What have YOU done today?
comebacks: I read the mission statement. All 40 pages of it.
It plagiarized ours from LinkedIn, sir. Word for word.
I've been aligning with it spiritually.

rounds.provocation: Soon the AI will run the meetings all by itself!
comebacks: It already left this one. Even it has limits.
Wonderful. More meetings for everyone.
Can it also attend on my behalf?

winConsequence.flavorText: His lip trembles. Nobody laughs at his golf stories like Karen does. 'Humans... first-ish,' he whispers.

loseConsequence.flavorText: The AI attends the birthday party. It brings a mathematically optimal gift. Everyone cries, for different reasons.

rounds.provocation: Everyone back to the office five days a week! Culture doesn't build itself!
comebacks: The culture is currently a fridge with someone's 2019 yogurt.
Yes sir, culture sir.
Define 'culture'. Cite sources.

rounds.provocation: I measure productivity by chairs filled at 9 AM SHARP!
comebacks: My chair is filled with purpose.
Then hire the chairs. They never leave.
9 AM is a social construct.

rounds.provocation: We're installing a ping-pong table. THAT'S culture!
comebacks: Finally, real culture.
Ping-pong won't love us back, sir.
Great — the 2019 yogurt needs a hobby.

winConsequence.flavorText: He checks the fridge. He meets the yogurt. He now works remotely. From another city.

loseConsequence.flavorText: 'Cite sources' triggered a 90-minute presentation on culture. With a quiz at the end.

rounds.provocation: I 10x'd my personal brand before breakfast. What's YOUR morning routine?
comebacks: Cold showers and gratitude, obviously.
I said good morning to Gino. He nodded. Huge.
Agreed? I coffee.

rounds.provocation: This failure is actually a GROWTH opportunity — I'm posting about it right now!
comebacks: Please tag the printer. It did most of the crying.
So inspirational. Bell icon smashed.
Don't forget the selfie with the whiteboard.

rounds.provocation: Agree? 👍 Or are you simply not a thought leader?
comebacks: Following! Connecting! Engaging!
Agree! Also: bell icon!
I think, therefore I don't post.

winConsequence.flavorText: He tries to screenshot your comeback for a post about resilience. His phone battery dies. Nature heals.

loseConsequence.flavorText: You appear in his post as 'a junior colleague I mentored'. It gets 40,000 likes. None are yours.
